type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: A trace amount of Cr(VI) is contained in any new high temperature shift catalyst that is brought onto site.  However, the Cr(VI) undergoes conversion to Cr(III) when the catalyst is actually put into use, thus there can never be any release of Cr(VI). During CY2014 we added new catalyst which we estimated to contain 114.28 kg of Cr(VI).  This was the first new catalyst brought onto the site since CY2011.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: A trace amount of hexavalent chromium is contained in any new high temperature shift (HTS) catalyst that is brought onto site.  However, the Cr(VI) is converted to Cr(III) when the new catalyst is actually put into use.  During CY2011 new HTS catalyst was brought onto the site and we estimated that it contained more than 50kg of Cr(VI).
